nasb.text: Nevertheless I say to you that it will be more tolerable for the land of Sodom in the day of judgment, than for you.”

esv.text: But I tell you that it will be more tolerable on the day of judgment for the land of Sodom than for you.”

cnv.text: 但我告訴你們，在審判的日子，所多瑪那地方所受的，比你還輕呢。”

ccb.text: 所以我告诉你们，在审判之日，你们将比所多玛受更重的刑罚！”

csbs.text: 不过我告诉你们：在那审判的日子，所多玛之地所受的，将要比你还容易受呢！”
